name: Kotak Infinite Credit Card
exclusions: positioned as a wealth-management card and eligibility is relationship-based
reward points are often presented alongside travel-mile conversion rather than high direct cashback value
domestic lounge access is capped at 4 visits per quarter
milestoneBenefits: 800 reward points worth Rs 800 every month in lieu of the current PVR-ticket interim benefit
Fuel surcharge waiver up to annual cap as per Kotak terms
additionalBenefits: 4 complimentary domestic lounge visits every quarter
2 complimentary rounds of golf in a month and quarterly guest golf benefit as per current Kotak page
Every 1 reward point converts to 2 air miles for partner travel redemption

salaried: Wealth-management relationship and Kotak approval may be required
selfEmployed: Wealth-management relationship and Kotak approval may be required
